title: poa granitica subsp. granitica
intro: Poa granitica subsp. granitica, also known as the Alpine Fescue, is a subspecies of grass that is native to high-altitude mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poa granitica subsp. granitica include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which is often used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and support immune function.
